title: Dashboard enhancements and bug fixes
body:
* **Import reports from Power BI and Tableau**: Authors can now import Power BI and Tableau reports as a new AI/BI dashboard directly from the dashboard list page. See [Import BI files using Genie Code](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/import-bi).
* **Improved metric view reuse when importing**: When importing Tableau and Power BI reports as AI/BI dashboards, Genie Code is now more likely to reference existing Unity Catalog metric views instead of creating new ones. See [Import BI files using Genie Code](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/import-bi).
* **Hide dashboard pages before publishing**: Authors can now hide dashboard pages so they aren't published, while continuing to edit them in draft mode. See [Create multi-page reports](/aws/en/dashboards/manage#multi-page-reports).
* **`STRING_AGG` function**: You can now use `STRING_AGG` to concatenate non-null string values within a group, with an optional custom delimiter. See [`string_agg` aggregate function](/aws/en/sql/language-manual/functions/string_agg).
* **Custom Vega visualization improvements**: Two enhancements for custom Vega-Lite visualizations. See [Custom visualizations in AI/BI dashboards](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/visualizations/custom-visualizations).
  + Cross-filtering now works for Vega-Lite charts. The selection appears in the active filter bar and is preserved in dashboard URLs and share links.
  + Custom Vega-Lite charts can now inherit the dashboard's light or dark mode and custom theme, and authors can reference theme values directly in Vega-Lite expressions.
* **Hide pivot table columns**: You can now hide columns in a pivot table. See [Pivot visualization](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/visualizations/types#pivot).
* **Counter widget comparison styling**: Counter widgets now support text styling on the comparison date and conditional coloring on the comparison field. See [Counter visualization](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/visualizations/types#counter).
* **More compact filter widgets**: Filter widgets on the dashboard canvas now appear more compact.
* **Dynamic table column widths**: Table columns now adjust their width automatically based on cell content.
* **Apply filters fix**: Fixed a bug where applying filters did not work.
* **Table column resize fix**: Fixed an issue where resizing a table column could unintentionally trigger a sort on that column.
* **Combo chart hover fix**: Fixed a console error that sometimes occurred when hovering over empty areas of a combo chart.

ref_links.text: Import BI files using Genie Code
